title: salix viridula
intro: Salix viridula, also known as the dwarf willow, is a small shrub or tree species belonging to the family Salicaceae. Traditionally, Salix viridula has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Salix viridula is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
